top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran Conflict Enters Dangerous New Phase With Fresh Missile Exchanges
top_signals.summary: Air raid sirens blared in Bahrain and other Gulf states as the struggle for control of the Strait of Hormuz continued after US forces conducted a ninth day of air strikes on targets around Iran. Tensions increased over the weekend in the Gulf after the deaths of three US soldiers -- and possibly a fourth -- were announced. US Central Command (CENTCOM) said the latest wave of strikes was aimed at degrading Iran's ability to threaten vessels transiting the strait, a strategic waterway that usually sees about one-fifth of the world's oil and gas transit.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lionheart (CUB) Nears $400 Million Deal for Venezuela Oil Stake
top_signals.summary: Lionheart Capital is close to a $400 million deal for a stake in a Venezuelan oil field, in what would be one of the first major private investments in the country’s oil industry since the US began easing sanctions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Boeing CEO says company still needs 'a couple more years' to repair finances before new jet
top_signals.summary: CEO Kelly Ortberg signalled Boeing is focused more on stabilizing its existing business than rushing to develop a successor to its bestselling 737 MAX.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: INR/USD: HSBC Offers Indian Diaspora 19x Leverage on FCNR(B) Deposits
top_signals.summary: When Moumita Shome landed in Dubai from Australia last month, the calls from bankers started almost immediately.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley cashes in on AI boom with debt deals
top_signals.summary: Wall Street bank emerges as chief architect of financing structures behind build-out of data centres
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
